task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Approval Queue** (Level 7)

Build an approval queue. Employees submit requests (title, description, amount). The request starts as 'pending'. A logged-in approver can update the status to 'approved' or 'rejected' (this requires auth). Need: POST /api/requests (public submit), GET /api/requests (list all), GET /api/requests/pending (filtered list), PUT /api/requests/:id (update, auth required).

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a
final_source:
/*
DATAFLOW:
┌──────────────┐    POST /api/requests    ┌──────────────┐    save    ┌────────┐
│ Frontend     │──────────────────────>   │ Backend      │ ────────> │   DB   │
│ (form)       │ <──────────────────────   │ (server)     │ <──────── │(memory)│
└──────────────┘    GET /api/requests     └──────────────┘   query   └────────┘
     │                                          │
     │  on page load --> GET /api/requests      │  PUT /api/requests/:id
     │  button click --> POST --> refresh       │  (requires login)
     │                                          │
     │  on page load --> GET /api/requests/pending
*/

build for web and javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Requests table:
  title, required
  description
  amount (number), default 0
  status, default 'pending'

allow signup and login
owner is 'admin@example.com'
allow signup and login
owner is 'admin@example.com'
log every request
# POST endpoint - submit request (public)
when user sends request to /api/requests:
  validate request:
    title must not be empty
  saved = save request to Requests
  send back saved with status 201

# GET all requests
when user calls GET /api/requests:
  send back all Requests

# GET pending requests
when user calls GET /api/requests/pending:
  send back all Requests where status is 'pending'

# PUT endpoint - update request (requires auth)
when user calls PUT /api/requests/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  updated = save changes to Requests with this id
  send back updated

page 'Approval Queue' at '/':
  section 'Submit Request':
    title_input = ''
    description_input = ''
    amount_input = 0
    
    'Title' is a text input saved as title_input
    'Description' is a text area saved as description_input
    'Amount' is a number input saved as amount_input
    
    button 'Submit':
      create request:
        title is title_input
        description is description_input
        amount = amount_input
      send request as a new request to '/api/requests'
      reload the page
  
  section 'All Requests':
    requests = ''
    on page load get requests from '/api/requests'
    display requests as table
